on_screen_text: I'm about to meet with more than 400 of the best New Yorkers that money can't...
I've entrusted these people with a huge responsibility.
to provide the policy and legislat... recommendations our transition team
are gifted public servants, artists, heads of nonprofits, organizers

on_screen_text: 17 transition committees based on subject area expertise.
17 transition committees based on subject area experts.
Each committee will be supervised by one of our incredible transition chairs.
